notes: Seed routes are intentionally minimal and should be narrowed or expanded in lockstep with implemented TypeScript handlers.

Routes with an implemented_* status must have a matching entry in apps/api/src/routes.ts and a matching current Python route snapshot; API-only replacements for Flask form routes must name the Flask source route in notes and use the manifest snapshot_method override.

Deferred scratch-proof routes are retained as future candidates only; they are not current Flask parity targets, not initial-cutover blockers, and must not be implemented without an explicit architecture/scope decision.
